name: xrpcw-contracts
description: Smart contracts implementing XRPL control wallet.
author: Flare SC team

scripts.coverage: forge coverage --report lcov && node scripts/forge-lcov-prune.js && genhtml lcov.info.pruned --branch-coverage --output-dir coverage
scripts.deploy_contracts_coston2: dotenv -e .env -- sh -c 'forge script deployment/scripts/DeploySmartAccounts.s.sol:DeploySmartAccounts --rpc-url $COSTON2_RPC_URL --private-key $DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY --broadcast' | tee forge-deploy-output.txt && ts-node deployment/scripts/save-deployed-addresses.ts
scripts.deploy_mock_contracts_coston2: dotenv -e .env -- sh -c 'forge script deployment/scripts/DeployXRPLControlledWalletDevMock.s.sol:DeployXRPLControlledWalletDevMock --rpc-url $COSTON2_RPC_URL --private-key $DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY --broadcast' | tee forge-deploy-output.txt && ts-node deployment/scripts/save-deployed-addresses.ts mock
